character.name: flesh_crawler
character.prompt: Crawling flesh abomination, limbless torso dragging itself with exposed ribcage arms, giant gaping mouth taking up half the body, trailing intestines and blood, pale grey-red rotting flesh, low crawling posture close to ground. STRICT top-down 90 degree view, dark palette with subtle red glowing veins, limited color palette 4-6 tones, high contrast edges, no background transparent, clean cut edges
